arts.ttl: Gary Neville slams Man Utd transfers and points finger at four players - but gets facts wrong
arts.sum: Gary Neville has again hit out at Manchester United's ownership for the current state of the club's squad, but he appeared to get his former United teams mixed up

arts.ttl: Roy Keane makes Ruben Amorim point which may make Man United think twice - 'not a good sign'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has been unable to install any improvement at the Reds during his brief tenure at Old Trafford so far.

arts.ttl: Manchester United forward ‘reaches agreement’ over summer exit
arts.sum: Manchester United and Atletico Madrid have reportedly reached an agreement over the transfer of Alejandro Garnacho this summer. Garnacho has been linked with an exit from Old Trafford amid reservations over his suitability to Ruben Amorim’s side and the need for sales to fund a rebuild. arts.ttl: Martinell on bench as Arsenal name team to face Man United
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli has been named on the bench for Arsenal at Manchester United this afternoon. The Brazilian has been out of action for a month after sustaining a hamstring injury against Newcastle in the Carabao Cup semi-final. After five games out, Martinelli is available and named as a substitute. His return is a welcome boost […] The post Martinell on bench as Arsenal name team to face Man United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United fans stage major protest against the Glazer family ahead of Premier League clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: Supporters' group The 1958 had announced plans to protest against the club's ownership on Tuesday. Fans were encouraged to wear black to symbolise how their club was 'slowly dying'.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Arsenal: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off at Old Trafford Get in touch: email John | Premier League top scorers There’s insurrection in the air at Old Trafford, with Sir Jim Ratcliffe and the Glazer family’s names being taken in vain. To say Big Sir Jim’s honeymoon period is over is to underplay things. BSJ has been spotted, too. Man Utd: Onana, Lindelof, de Ligt, Yoro, Mazraoui, Eriksen, Casemiro, Dalot, Garnacho, Fernandes, Zirkzee. Subs: Mee, Harrison, Hojlund, Heaven, Amass, Collyer, Obi, Fletcher, Moorhouse. arts.ttl: Arsenal draw up ‘seven-striker shortlist’ for summer window
arts.sum: Arsenal have drawn up a shortlist of seven potential signings to end the club’s search for a centre-forward. Mikel Arteta has made the signing of a number nine the club’s focus for the summer transfer window. The Gunners have seen their title challenge derailed in the absence of a recognised forward, after Gabriel Jesus and […] The post Arsenal draw up ‘seven-striker shortlist’ for summer window first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Asking price set: Arsenal eyeing 10-goal Englishman to address key weakness
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to improve their attacking unit and they have identified Liam Delap from Ipswich Town as a potential target ahead of the summer window. According to a report from Fichajes, Arsenal are looking at multiple attacking options, but Delap happens to be one of the names that has attracted the most interest.
